title: Phase 32.3A — Batch 2 Final Pre-Audit (NO DEPLOY)
deployment_status: NOT DEPLOYED — staging only. Must pass final Auditor approval after Batch 1 proves discovery health.

auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.use_case: Auto / Large Purchase — $30K at 7% for 5 years
auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.doorway_risk: EXPECTED SAFE — fixed from 87 in Phase 32.2 with deeper secured/unsecured content
auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.uniqueness: Dealer financing comparison, GAP insurance guidance, secured vs unsecured deep dive
auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.demand_evidence: Autocomplete triggers for '30000 loan 7 percent'. Common auto loan query.
auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.missing_sections: None — score 91 indicates all sections present
auto_large_purchase_30k_7pct.notes: Strongest Batch 2 candidate. High demand, clear unique value.

medical_dental_10k_12pct.doorway_risk: UNKNOWN — not yet scored. Medical financing has some doorway potential if too thin.
medical_dental_10k_12pct.uniqueness: Medical financing alternatives (CareCredit, payment plans, HSA/FSA), hospital vs dental loan differences
medical_dental_10k_12pct.demand_evidence: Autocomplete: 'medical loan 10000'. Common healthcare financing query.
medical_dental_10k_12pct.missing_sections: Cannot assess — page not scored yet
medical_dental_10k_12pct.ready_for_coding_after_jun_25: NEEDS SCORE FIRST — cannot approve without quality audit
medical_dental_10k_12pct.notes: Needs quality scoring before any approval decision.

home_improvement_15k_9pct.uniqueness: Home improvement ROI analysis, HELOC vs personal loan comparison, value-add renovation guidance
home_improvement_15k_9pct.notes: Potentially strong. Home improvement has high user intent.

wedding_event_10k_14pct.doorway_risk: MODERATE — wedding loan pages are common in low-quality SEO. Must differentiate.
wedding_event_10k_14pct.uniqueness: Wedding budget alternatives, cost-saving strategies, 'save vs borrow' analysis
wedding_event_10k_14pct.demand_evidence: Seasonal demand. 'Wedding loan 10000' has moderate search volume.
wedding_event_10k_14pct.should_be_killed: UNDECIDED — highest kill risk due to doorway potential
wedding_event_10k_14pct.notes: Needs strong differentiation from spammy wedding loan pages. Consider replacing with a different use case.

high_apr_warning_5k_29pct.use_case: High APR Warning — $5K at 29% for 2 years
high_apr_warning_5k_29pct.doorway_risk: LOW — warning/educational pages are naturally anti-doorway
high_apr_warning_5k_29pct.uniqueness: Predatory lending warning, APR cap explainer, 'when to walk away' guidance
high_apr_warning_5k_29pct.demand_evidence: Niche but high-value. 'High APR loan' / '29% loan' are cautionary queries.
high_apr_warning_5k_29pct.notes: Strongest concept after auto purchase. Warning pages are inherently unique and non-doorway. Good for trust/E-E-A-T.

summary.ready_for_audit: Only auto_large_purchase (score 91) has a score. Other 4 need quality scoring first.
summary.kill_candidates: Wedding/Event at highest risk of doorway classification. Consider replacing with: Small Business Loan $15K at 11% or Student Loan Refinance $30K at 6%.
summary.next_step: Score remaining 4 pages when Batch 1 shows discovery health (Jun 25). Full Auditor review before any code deployment.

status: STAGING — pre-audit complete. 4 of 5 pages need scoring before audit.
